name: Memory Garden shows narrative description and plant grid or story-driven empty state
description: After improving the Memory Garden narrative, verify the page shows the RPG-style description about knowledge growing like a garden.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading

Verify the page shows either a plant grid with health indicators OR an empty state message about 'garden awaits' or 'knowledge grows'. The description should mention plants, blooming, or watering — not be generic.
